free_text: Sigma curves and average resonance parameters are given
The total neutron cross-sections and resonance
parameters of the even 58,60,62,64Ni isotopes for
energies ranging from 2 eV to 8000 eV
Ni-60 filter of ~25.g/cm2 thickness behind chopper.
